<Heading
  as={"h1"}
  className={"openapi__heading"}
  children={"List Marketplace Plugins"}
>
</Heading>

<MethodEndpoint
  method={"get"}
  path={"/api/v1/marketplace/plugins"}
  context={"endpoint"}
>
  
</MethodEndpoint>



List available plugins in the marketplace.

Supports optional ``keyword`` filtering (case-insensitive
substring match against name, description, and keywords)
and ``limit`` / ``offset`` pagination.

  id={"request"}
  as={"h2"}
  className={"openapi-tabs__heading"}
